gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/160)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/160)
text: إِذَا رَأَيْتَ الرَّجُلَ وَ قَدِ ابْتُلِيَ وَ أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ فَقُلِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي لَا أَسْخَرُ وَ لَا أَفْخَرُ وَ لَكِنْ أَحْمَدُكَ عَلَى عَظِيمِ نَعْمَائِكَ عَلَيَّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Usman Bin Isa, from Khalid Bin Najeeh,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When you see the man who has been afflicted and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has Favoured upon you, so say, ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! I am neither ridiculing nor priding, but I am praising You<sup>azwj</sup> upon the great Bounty of Yours<sup>azwj</sup> upon me’.
en.sarwar: 22. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn ‘Abd Allah from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Khalid ibn Najih from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘When you see a man who is in affliction and Allah has granted you a favor, say, “O Allah, I do not ridicule him or boast, but I express Your praise for the great favors that You have done for me.”’”
